sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102774" key="te/qnaqi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τέθνᾰθι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθναίην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνάκην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνάμεν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνάμεναι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνάναι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνᾶσι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνεώς</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνήξομαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνήξω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνηώς</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθνώς</orth>, <sense id="n102774.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θνῄσκω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
